oddaccessories.config.title: 古怪饰品MOD配置
tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.collectibl: §7吸引§e%s§7格内的小僵尸，且他们会变成友好生物
tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.emergency_: §7Deploys a §eparachute §7when the holder falls more than §e%s §7blocks
tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.fiberglass: §7All incoming damage is multiplied by §c%sx§7. While sneaking, the holder cannot attack, but is §binvisible to mobs §7as long as §e%s §7or fewer are nearby
tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.hourglass: §7Every §e%ss§7, the holder's health is §brolled back §7to what it was §e%ss§7 earlier
tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.mimic_ring: §7Shift + Right-Click with an empty hand to summon a §ePlayer Mimic §7that copies the holder's items, attributes, and effects. §e%s%% of incoming damage is §bredirected §7to the mimic
tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.old_sock: §7所有§e%s§7格内的实体（包括你）都会被施加§8缓慢§7和§2反胃

tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.pork_effig: §7All types of pigs become aggressive towards the holder, but drop §6extra loot
tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.portable_t: §7While equipped, the TV §enotifies §7the holder when shows air. During airtime, right-click with the item in hand to start playback. While watching, the holder gains the §bHappy §7effect

tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.villager_m: §7村民会主动远离你，但他们死后会掉落§6额外战利品
tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.loaded_dic: §7On critical hit, roll a die. Higher rolls grant stronger §abuffs §7or §cdebuffs§7 to the holder
tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.rusted_nai: §7The holder receives §cTetanus §7when hurt (drains §c%s%% of current HP)
tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.malice: §7When attacking non-aggressive or unaware mobs, increase the §cdamage output§7 of the holder by §c%s%%
tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.flaying_to: §7Increases the §cdamage output§7 of the holder by §c%s%%
tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.anomalous_: §7Incoming damage to the holder is §5inverted§7, except when damage would exceed the holder's §cmaximum health
tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.regret_of_: §7Beds will explode §7when the holder attempts to sleep in them, granting §b%s experience

tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.pungent_fl: §7The holder's arrows apply a random §cnegative effect

tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.malicious_: §7Increases the §cdamage output§7 of the holder by §c%s%%
tooltip.kubejs.oddaccessories.crown_of_n: §7When hurt, applies §cTetanus §7(§c%ss§7) to both the attacker and holder. The holder receives §c%sx damage from §cTetanus
